creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Kryvulia from comment #4)
> Can we ship a minimal /etc/wpa_supplicant.conf with base system?
Technically speaking, we do.
Won't /usr/share/examples/etc/wpa_supplicant.conf
do it for you? Simply copy it to /etc/ and hack it to taste, then
follow that with a service netif restart.
